name: ASUS PRIME B850M-A AMD B850 (AM5 Socket) micro-ATX motherboard,DDR5,PCIe 5.0 Ready,three M.2 slots,Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet,dual DisplayPort,front USB 5Gbps Type-C support,BIOS FlashBack,Aura Sync
